# Dang Pham — UI / Product Designer

> UI & Product Designer based in Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam. Specializing in mobile, web, and SaaS interface design.

## About
8+ years designing across mobile apps, SaaS dashboards, e-commerce, and branding for 6 companies including S3Corp., Shopline, and Select Technology. Focused on research-driven, clean, intuitive interfaces.

## Selected Work
- [Nova — Dashboard & SaaS UI Kit](/work/nova-ui-kit): production-ready SaaS UI kit, token-based design system, light & dark themes.
- [Serenity — Meditation App Redesign](/work/meditation-app): calming mobile experience, accessibility and micro-interactions.
- [Pulse — Analytics Dashboard](/work/analytics-dashboard): data-rich SaaS dashboard designed for clarity.
- [Elevate — 3D Landing Page Concept](/work/3d-landing-page): 3D illustration meets modern UI.

## Skills
Figma, Adobe XD, Photoshop, Illustrator, Blender, After Effects; AI tools: Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, ComfyUI.
